proven.claim: Proven: "override" appears in help (line 548) AND is implemented as
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 548
; Proven: "override" appears in help (line 548) AND is implemented as
; case "override": runOverride(rest) in the switch.
(declare-const override_documented Int)
(declare-const override_implemented Int)
(assert (= override_documented 1))
(assert (= override_implemented 1))
(assert (not (= override_documented override_implemented)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — override is both documented and implemented
